name: Palinda Group Holdings Limited
summary: Palinda Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the production, sale, and distribution of food products in Hong Kong and Australia. The company operates through Wine Business, Food Products Operations, Investments, and Money Lending segments. It offers barbequed food and Taiwanese Lou Mei to concessionaire stores in supermarkets; sells and distributes wine products and grapes; and invests in securities, such as equity securities and funds, as well as engages in the money lending business. The company was formerly known as Food Idea Holdings Limited and changed its name to Palinda Group Holdings Limited in October 2020. Palinda Group Holdings Limited was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Hung Hom, Hong Kong.
